title: We want to hire a Monday.com Expert!
excerpt:
Hello, 
We are a Norwegian webdesign-company (6 persons) and we have now used Monday as our primary project management tool for the last 2 years. But everything we do, we do manually and it takes up alot of our time ever…

posts.author: Nettpakke (Christian Bakke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are a Norwegian webdesign-company (6 persons) and we have now used Monday as our primary project management tool for the last 2 years. But everything we do, we do manually and it takes up alot of our time everyday to log all our actions in Monday.

We want to hire an expert that can help us with automations and to set up our workflow so that everything works smoothly and more effective. For example when we register a new client with all information, it would be nice if some button could copy this information in to the “Production” board. Now I have to write in the same information in 4 different boards everytime we make a sale (Client list, production pipe, Support pipe and hosting pipe)

Anyone?

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Nettpakke,

Glad to hear you’ve been enjoying your monday.com experience! Considering monday is a sandbox environment, we understand that even simple automations can be very time consuming. That is why CarbonWeb has been partnering with companies to collaboratively achieve their goals when it comes to workflow automation.

I believe your solution may be possible and would like to offer you one hour of free consultative work with one of our experts to see what might be possible. If you are interested in discussing this a bit more please schedule a time here. Calendly - Ricky Tomer

Good luck!
Ricky

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @Nettpakke

You are in the right place to find an expert!

My team and I have done this many times over for our clients We specialise in making sure you get the most out of your Monday.com set up (Automating as much as possible).

I have specialised in Monday.com for over four years now and love the software! My team also has a background in management and projects, allowing us to streamline our clients’ processes efficiently! On my team, we have another 3 Monday specialists, a project manager and a developer/Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current set-up and show you some options. You can book a session through this link.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Nettpakke

Would love to sit down with you and get you set up with automations to streamline your workflows. I have helped many clients automate workflows within monday.com. monday.com provides many automations to meet your needs, and if there are areas where the monday.com provided automations don’t work I can help with custom automations using integromat to make sure you get the most out of your workflows.

If you are interested in talking more and seeing if we are a good fit to work together feel free to schedule a 30m free consult: Calendly - Tim Little

Best!

posts.author: Nettpakke (Christian Bakke)
posts.cookedHtml: I have already booked a time with you 29/07, 18:00

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml: ah, Right on. I just saw the split post from back in June and now I see your invite. Looking forward to chatting!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nettpakke

Welcome to the monday .com community!

By developing customized workflows in monday com using an appropriate template, your team can automate repetitive tasks and enhance productivity. Besides, integrating your monday com account with other enterprise apps enables automated workflows between desired data sources while keeping conditions of logic, routing, and data formatting as is.

You can hire monday.com experts from the monday com preferred partner company. Through seamless integrations and custom workflow deployment, experts can help your team experience new ways of working through modernized workflows.
